# Native PowerPoint test decks

These decks are deterministic OOXML packages generated by `generate-fixtures.mjs`.
They are committed so automated tests use real binary presentation files rather
than mocks.

- `features.pptx`, `features.ppsx`, and `features.potx` include notes, a theme,
  an image, a hyperlink, a chart, a table, grouped shapes, a timing node, and an
  unknown custom OOXML part.
- `simple-edit.pptx` is a supported-shape editing fixture.
- `macro-view-only.*` include an inert `vbaProject.bin` payload. They test that
  macro-enabled files remain view-only and that untouched macro bytes survive a
  renderer round trip. They do not contain executable VBA.
- `large-deck.pptx` contains 160 slides.
- `malformed-*` cover random bytes, truncation, path traversal, and duplicate ZIP
  entries.

Regenerate the files with `npm run test:update-fixtures`.
